mnemonics.title: Complexity Order
mnemonics.content: Only Some Programs Need Constant Optimization: O(1) < O(log n) < O(n) < O(n log n) < O(n²) < O(2ⁿ) < O(n!)

acronyms.usage: Used when discussing asymptotic upper bounds

visualTips.visualization: Imagine graphs: O(1) flat line, O(n) straight diagonal, O(n²) steep curve upwards

analogies.analogy: Like finding a word in dictionary by halving sections - eliminates half possibilities each step
